sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13257" key="a)po/mucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόμυξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13257.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blowing one's nose,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1084c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
